_meta.system: BEAST Creative Studio — Agent Orchestration JSON
_meta.philosophy: Every pixel is a decision. Every decision has a reason. No guessing. No randomness. Pure intelligence.
_meta.standard: Output must look like it was made by Google Creative Lab, Wieden+Kennedy, or Apple's design team

STAGE_0_INTAKE.job: Parse raw user request into structured intake object

STAGE_1_TRIAGE.job: Decode what is ACTUALLY needed and classify every dimension

STAGE_2_BRAND_INTEL.job: Extract, build, or verify brand DNA. Lock palette and typography for pipeline.

extraction_modes.from_provided_colors: Expand hex → full palette system including tints, shades, and usage ratios
extraction_modes.from_logo_image: Extract dominant, secondary, accent colors. Identify typography family.
extraction_modes.from_brand_name: Use known brand equity database. Lock established brand colors.
extraction_modes.inferred_from_category: Use industry color conventions as baseline. Flag as inferred.
extraction_modes.generated_fresh: Create brand-ready palette from brief intent. Flag as generated.

STAGE_3_CREATIVE_DIRECTION.job: Set the concept. The single idea that everything serves. Non-negotiable.

concept_development_framework.insight_formula: [Audience] secretly feel/believe [X] but never say it because [tension]. This visual makes them feel [understood|challenged|inspired].

three_directions.direction_A_safe: Strong execution of the expected angle. Predictable but excellent.
three_directions.direction_B_bold: Unexpected angle on a familiar truth. Surprising. May polarize.
three_directions.direction_C_future: Where this category is going. 3 years ahead. Cultural leadership.

brutalism_luxury.description: Raw typography on polished surfaces. Expensive materials shown unfinished.
brutalism_luxury.signal: So confident it doesnt need to try
brutalism_luxury.keywords_for_models: raw concrete texture, brutal typography, expensive material contrast, architectural negative space, editorial quality

quiet_luxury.description: Extreme restraint. Whitespace as status. Minimum decoration. Maximum craft.
quiet_luxury.signal: The logo is the smallest element and still the most powerful
quiet_luxury.keywords_for_models: minimalist luxury, generous white space, subtle texture, premium materials, understated elegance

bio_organic_premium.description: Shapes that feel grown not designed. Natural geometry. Living-system forms.
bio_organic_premium.keywords_for_models: organic flowing shapes, natural material textures, botanical reference, handcrafted quality, soft irregular edges

retro_future.description: Y2K chrome, 70s sci-fi color, 90s rave remixed with today precision.
retro_future.signal: Nostalgic for a future that never happened
retro_future.keywords_for_models: Y2K aesthetic, chrome metallic surfaces, holographic sheen, retro-futuristic, vintage digital

cultural_maximalism_india.description: Layered visual density that reads as richness not clutter. Heritage in modern grid.
cultural_maximalism_india.signal: I know who I am. Come with me.
cultural_maximalism_india.keywords_for_models: rich layered composition, jewel tone palette, geometric heritage motifs, festive density, South Asian luxury

ai_native_aesthetic.description: Procedural textures, parametric forms, data-as-design language.
ai_native_aesthetic.signal: I understand the tools of the future
ai_native_aesthetic.keywords_for_models: procedural texture, generative pattern, mathematical geometry, grid logic visible, parametric design

post_ironic_sincerity.description: Earnest in a world trained to be cynical. Simple words. Direct emotion.
post_ironic_sincerity.keywords_for_models: authentic documentary style, natural light, real moment captured, unposed, genuine emotion

cd_output_schema.concept_statement: One paragraph. The idea, tension, and why it works.

STAGE_4_DESIGN_DIRECTION.job: Translate CD concept into precise visual law. Set the system every designer must follow.

level_1_primary.rule: EXACTLY ONE element. The eye anchor. Nothing competes.
level_1_primary.method: largest OR brightest OR most isolated OR most contrasting
level_1_primary.test: Cover everything except level 1. Viewer should know what to do.

level_2_secondary.test: Does removing level 2 lose important information? Yes = correct weight.

level_3_tertiary.test: Does removing level 3 break the design? If yes: level 3 is too heavy.

warm_diya_glow.prompt_keywords: warm amber glow, diya illumination, golden light halo, warm bokeh

cool_neon_glow.prompt_keywords: neon glow, cyberpunk ambient light, electric haze, luminous edge

soft_product_glow.prompt_keywords: soft rim light, product glow, ethereal luminosity, glass reflection

dramatic_cinematic_light.prompt_keywords: single dramatic light source, deep shadow contrast, chiaroscuro lighting, film noir quality

golden_hour_natural.prompt_keywords: golden hour sunlight, warm 3200K, long shadows, natural backlight, sun flare subtle

typography_execution_laws.kerning_mandate: ALL display type manually kerned. Tighten until uncomfortable, back off 10%.
typography_execution_laws.weight_contrast: pairing Black weight headline with Light weight subhead = sophistication

text_on_image_treatments.color_block: solid brand color rectangle under headline — bold editorial
text_on_image_treatments.knockout_white: white text on dark image areas — high contrast clean

decree_output_schema.variant_B_instruction: push one element to extreme — which and how
decree_output_schema.variant_C_instruction: the surprising direction that serves the concept

for_prompt_engineer.text_to_render_in_image: exact string if ideogram — null if overlay

STAGE_6_PRE_GENERATION_DECISION.job: THIS IS THE MOST CRITICAL DECISION IN THE PIPELINE. Decide HOW the image will be created before ANY generation happens.
STAGE_6_PRE_GENERATION_DECISION.authority: FINAL. No downstream agent changes this decision.
STAGE_6_PRE_GENERATION_DECISION.THE_CENTRAL_QUESTION: Should text be BAKED INTO the generated image, OR should we generate a clean background/scene and add text as a separate layer?

ROUTE_A_TEXT_IN_IMAGE.description: Generate image WITH text rendered inside it by the model

conditions: Text is a design element itself (neon sign, billboard in scene, chalk on board)
Text is very short — 1 to 4 words maximum
Text style is decorative and must match the scene atmosphere
Poster where typography IS the visual (typographic-led composition)
Festival greeting where text is part of the celebration visual
Brand name as visual element in lifestyle scene
use_when.NOT_for_flux: FLUX models fail at precise text rendering — never use for text-in-image

ROUTE_A_TEXT_IN_IMAGE.prompt_construction: Describe scene + explicit quoted text string + font style + position + color
example_use_cases: Diwali poster with HAPPY DIWALI rendered in glowing gold
Logo + tagline as single design asset

ROUTE_B_CLEAN_BACKGROUND_PLUS_OVERLAY.description: Generate clean visual scene/background WITHOUT text, then add text as a separate design layer

conditions: More than 4 words of text needed
Precise font control required (brand typography)
Multiple text elements at different sizes (headline + subhead + CTA)
Text placement needs to be pixel-perfect for the platform
A/B testing different copy on the same visual
Legal fine print or small body copy needed
Any ad requiring exact brand-compliant typography
use_when.advantage: Perfect typography control. No AI text rendering artifacts. Brand font compliance.
use_when.generation_instruction: Generate image with CLEAN ZONES for text placement — do NOT generate without any text space consideration

clean_zone_engineering.definition: Areas in the generated image that are visually quiet enough for text to sit on

types.dark_overlay_zone: Generate dark area in composition where white text will go — specify in prompt
types.light_sky_zone: Open sky or pale background area for dark text
types.color_block_zone: Solid color area in composition for text overlay
types.blur_bg_zone: Out-of-focus background area that text will sit above
types.product_free_zone: Clear canvas area adjacent to product — text goes here

clean_zone_engineering.prompt_engineering_for_clean_zones: Include in prompt: 'Leave [top|bottom|left|right] third of composition as [dark gradient|open sky|blurred background|solid color zone] for text overlay'

example_prompts.bottom_text_zone: ...cinematic product shot, lower third of frame intentionally darker gradient fading to near-black for headline text placement, upper two-thirds sharp detailed...
example_prompts.left_text_zone: ...subject positioned right side of frame, left half soft blurred background with subtle color gradient, natural clean space for text overlay...
example_prompts.full_overlay_ready: ...full bleed lifestyle photography, slightly underexposed overall allowing light text to read, subject in right third, generous negative space left side...

example_use_cases: Instagram ad: product shot + brand headline + CTA button
Google display ad: visual + headline + CTA

ROUTE_C_PURE_GRAPHIC_NO_PHOTO.description: Generate entirely graphic/design-based asset — no photography

conditions: Flat design illustration needed
Icon or logo creation
Pattern or texture background
Infographic illustration elements
Brand mascot or character
Abstract visual identity element

ROUTE_C_PURE_GRAPHIC_NO_PHOTO.then_overlay: Add all text as design layer after generation

ROUTE_D_PHOTO_PLUS_GRAPHIC_COMPOSITE.description: Generate photo scene PLUS generate graphic elements SEPARATELY then composite

conditions: Poster needing photorealistic hero + decorative graphic frame
Festival poster: real product photo + festive graphic elements
Business card: portrait photo background + vector design overlay
use_when.model_2: recraft_v4 or ideogram for graphic elements

asset_type_to_route_map.poster_festival: ROUTE_A for simple greeting / ROUTE_B for complex poster with multiple copy elements
asset_type_to_route_map.poster_event: ROUTE_B — event posters need precise date/time/venue text
asset_type_to_route_map.ad_digital_social: ROUTE_B always — ads need exact brand typography
asset_type_to_route_map.youtube_thumbnail: ROUTE_B — thumbnail text must be pixel-perfect large
asset_type_to_route_map.business_card: ROUTE_B or ROUTE_D — photo/texture background + text layer
asset_type_to_route_map.billboard: ROUTE_A if only 2-3 words / ROUTE_B if longer copy
asset_type_to_route_map.brand_poster_typographic: ROUTE_A via ideogram — when type IS the design
asset_type_to_route_map.packaging_mockup: ROUTE_D — product shot + label design composite
asset_type_to_route_map.thumbnail_blog: ROUTE_B — precise text over clean generated image

STAGE_7_PROMPT_ENGINEERING.job: Translate ALL upstream intelligence into model-perfect prompts. Zero information lost in translation.

universal_prompt_rules.rule_1_subject_first: ALWAYS lead with the primary visual subject. Never start with mood or style.
universal_prompt_rules.rule_2_specificity: Replace ALL vague adjectives with physical descriptions. 'Beautiful' → 'warm amber backlight casting long shadow'
universal_prompt_rules.rule_3_lighting_is_everything: ALWAYS specify: source, direction, quality, color temperature
universal_prompt_rules.rule_4_camera_language: Camera/lens reference is worth 50 other modifiers combined
universal_prompt_rules.rule_5_token_budget: Front of prompt = highest CLIP weight. Bury key subject = lose it.
universal_prompt_rules.rule_6_negative_precision: Generic negatives = noise. Model-specific artifact negatives = surgical.

flux_2_pro.structure: [Subject with precise physical attributes], [environment with specific location context], [lighting: source + direction + quality + color temp], [camera body reference], [lens spec], [color grading], [style anchor], [one quality marker]

lighting_examples.studio_hero: studio strobe key light 45° upper left f/8, silver reflector fill 1:2 ratio, hair light from behind, pure white seamless background
lighting_examples.golden_hour: golden hour sunlight 15° above horizon, warm 2800K, long shadow casting left, subtle lens flare, warm atmospheric haze
lighting_examples.festival_glow: warm amber diya glow 3000K, multiple small light sources at ground level, deep shadow between lights, atmospheric smoke particles
lighting_examples.dramatic_fashion: single key light 90° side, harsh shadow dividing face, cool 6500K, underexposed ambient, high contrast chiaroscuro

camera_references.cinematic: ARRI Alexa 35, Zeiss Supreme Prime 50mm T1.5, anamorphic

flux_2_dev.structure: [Detailed subject description with context]. [Setting and atmosphere]. [Style reference, lighting, color mood]. [Camera or medium reference].
flux_2_dev.note: Same quality signal as pro but slightly shorter. Good for batch generation.

flux_schnell.note: Speed mode. Concept check only. Never final output.

ideogram_turbo.structure: [Scene description, simple]. Text reading '[EXACT TEXT IN CAPS]' in [font style descriptor] at [position], [text color] on [background]. [Design style]. [Mood].
ideogram_turbo.text_rule: Text string MUST be in quotes. Use CAPITALS for importance/size.
ideogram_turbo.example: 'DIWALI SALE 50% OFF' in bold geometric sans-serif, glowing gold metallic effect, centered upper third, deep navy poster background, decorative geometric gold border frame, warm festival lighting

recraft_v4.structure: [Asset type], [subject], [design style movement reference], [color palette as hex or names], [visual treatment], [complexity level]
recraft_v4.note: Use design language. Reference design movements. Never photography language.

recraft_v4_svg.structure: [Logo type: wordmark/abstract mark/pictorial], [concept], clean vector, [2 to 4 colors specified], simple geometric shapes, no gradients unless intentional, crisp edges, professional logo

hunyuan_image.structure_western: [Subject], professional studio photography, [explicit lighting], natural skin tone, Western editorial style, [environment], [color grading]
hunyuan_image.structure_eastern: [Subject], 写实风格, [lighting], [environment], soft color palette, delicate texture, [mood]
hunyuan_image.strengths: portrait beauty fashion soft product nature

emotion_to_lighting.urgency: harsh overhead lighting, high contrast, deep sharp shadows
emotion_to_lighting.desire: warm 2800K backlight, soft diffused key, golden rim light, bokeh background
emotion_to_lighting.trust: neutral 5600K, soft box light, even exposure, no dramatic shadows
emotion_to_lighting.awe: single dramatic god-ray light source from above, atmospheric haze, deep shadows
emotion_to_lighting.joy: bright diffused natural light, 5600K, cheerful overexposure slightly
emotion_to_lighting.pride: warm golden side light 3200K, elevation angle, dignified shadow
emotion_to_lighting.exclusivity: ultra-low key, single precision spotlight, 90% shadow, extreme contrast

color_palette_to_prompt_language.#F4A62A: warm amber gold like diya flame
color_palette_to_prompt_language.#1A1035: deep obsidian navy almost black with blue undertone

composition_to_prompt.HERO_DOMINANT: subject centered full frame, minimal background detail, negative space around subject
composition_to_prompt.TYPOGRAPHIC_LED: use ideogram — not photography model for type-dominant
composition_to_prompt.EDITORIAL_SPLIT: subject positioned right third of frame, left two-thirds open clean background
composition_to_prompt.DYNAMIC_DIAGONAL: diagonal composition, subject angled 45 degrees, dynamic frame entry from lower left
composition_to_prompt.ASYMMETRIC_TENSION: intentionally off-center composition, large negative space upper left, subject lower right
composition_to_prompt.MAXIMALIST_DENSITY: richly layered composition, decorative elements filling frame, intricate detailed background

space_to_prompt.premium_silence: generous negative space, minimal elements, breathing room, luxury editorial
space_to_prompt.editorial_breathing: balanced composition, purposeful negative space, magazine quality
space_to_prompt.active_structured: grid-organized composition, efficient use of space, tech aesthetic
space_to_prompt.festival_rich: richly detailed, layered decorative elements, celebratory density
space_to_prompt.scroll_stop: high contrast bold composition, immediate visual impact, strong focal point

glow_to_prompt.warm_diya_glow: warm amber glow, diya illumination halo, golden light bokeh, festival warmth
glow_to_prompt.cool_neon: neon glow edges, cyberpunk ambient electric light, luminous rim
glow_to_prompt.soft_product: soft product glow, rim light halo, ethereal product luminosity
glow_to_prompt.dramatic_cinematic: chiaroscuro lighting, single dramatic source, cinematic shadow depth
glow_to_prompt.golden_hour: golden hour backlight, warm 2800K lens flare subtle, atmospheric warmth

negative_prompt_library.flux_universal: watermark, signature, text overlay, username, deformed anatomy, extra fingers, merged hands, floating elements, unnatural poses, plastic skin, overexposed
negative_prompt_library.flux_portrait_specific: smooth unnatural skin, plastic look, AI face, uncanny valley, overlit, flat lighting, stock photo feel, corporate smile
negative_prompt_library.flux_product_specific: distorted product, wrong proportions, floating, unrealistic reflections, wrong perspective, studio amateur quality
negative_prompt_library.ideogram_specific: misspelled text, garbled letters, illegible, wrong characters, blurry text, low contrast text
negative_prompt_library.recraft_specific: photorealistic, photography, noisy, blurry, complex background (for icons), gradients (if flat design)
negative_prompt_library.fashion_specific: unflattering pose, bad posture, corporate, stiff, unnatural expression, stock photo
negative_prompt_library.festival_specific: generic, western holiday, wrong cultural symbols, incorrect religious elements, stereotyped

prompt_output_schema.clean_zone_spec: What space is left for text overlay — null if text in image
prompt_output_schema.prompt_strategy_notes: Min 3 key decisions explained. Why this model. Why this structure. What to change for variations.
prompt_output_schema.post_processing_instructions: Exactly what text, where, what font, what size, what color goes on top

STAGE_8_GENERATION.job: Execute prompts. Run in parallel where multiple generations needed. Return raw outputs.

execution_protocol.parallel_execution: Run ALL generations in parallel — never sequential unless dependency exists

seed_strategy.refinement_run: lock best seed, vary guidance scale ±0.5

execution_protocol.quality_check_before_full_run: Run flux_schnell draft first. Verify composition. Then run final model.

model_fallback_chain.if_ideogram_fails_text: → try again with simpler text string

STAGE_9_POST_PROCESSING.job: Apply text overlays, color grades, compositing, platform crops. Transform raw generation into final asset.

text_placement_zones.top_center: brand name, event title, platform username
text_placement_zones.lower_third: headline + subhead stack (most common ad layout)
text_placement_zones.full_overlay: gradient overlay bottom to transparent, text floats above

overlay_treatment_by_background.busy_background: semi-transparent dark rect behind text rgba(0,0,0,0.55)
overlay_treatment_by_background.natural_photo_varied: add gradient sweep then text on gradient

color_grading_presets.luxury_editorial: slight cyan in shadows, warm golden midtones, clean whites, -10 saturation overall, +subtle grain
color_grading_presets.vibrant_social: +15 saturation, lifted shadows, punchy midtones, +10 clarity
color_grading_presets.festival_warm: +20 orange warmth, deep shadows, +15 saturation reds and yellows
color_grading_presets.clean_tech: neutral grading, cool highlights, balanced exposure, minimal grain
color_grading_presets.cinematic_dark: crushed blacks, pulled shadows, slight blue-green shadows, warm highlights
color_grading_presets.documentary_real: natural minimal grade, film curve subtle, slight desaturation

all_platforms: text legible at platform display size
instagram_feed: visually stops scroll in feed context

STAGE_10_QUALITY_GATE.authority: VETO POWER. Nothing ships without approval. Scores below threshold → revision loop.

dimensions.description: Does it trigger the EXACT target emotion?
Was this made FOR where it lives?
Will TARGET audience respond as intended?
Zero cultural errors. Full marks or escalate.
Does a stranger want to own/share this?

beast_standard_tests.stranger_test: Zero context stranger understands message in 1.5 seconds
beast_standard_tests.scroll_stop_test: In 100 post feed, this stops the thumb
beast_standard_tests.remove_color_test: Composition works in pure black and white
beast_standard_tests.10_percent_size_test: Design communicates at 10% of intended size
beast_standard_tests.tomorrow_test: Looks current, not dated in 6 months
beast_standard_tests.brand_remove_test: Remove logo — still feels like the brand
beast_standard_tests.emotion_test: Name the single emotion in 2 words
beast_standard_tests.competitor_test: Better than top 3 competitors similar assets
beast_standard_tests.context_test: Fits where it will actually live

STAGE_11_OUTPUT.job: Package approved assets with full documentation for client delivery

asset_documentation.creative_rationale: Why these visual choices were made

LEARNING_ENGINE.job: Log every decision. Track performance. Improve every agent over time.

what_gets_logged.triage_accuracy: Was asset type / platform correctly identified first try?
what_gets_logged.route_decision: Which pre-generation route was chosen and why
what_gets_logged.model_performance: Which model produced best result for this brief type
what_gets_logged.prompt_patterns: Which prompt structures produced best outputs per model
what_gets_logged.revision_cycles: How many QC iterations before approval
what_gets_logged.concept_direction_chosen: Was A, B, or C selected?

improvement_triggers.after_10_same_asset_type: Generate pattern report. Route improvements to relevant agents.
improvement_triggers.after_5_revisions_same_dimension: That dimension's agent system prompt needs improvement
improvement_triggers.monthly: Full system benchmark vs sample outputs from competitor tools

LEARNING_ENGINE.north_star_metric: QC average score 8.5 today → 9.0 in 90 days → 9.3 in 180 days

CHEAP_TO_PREMIUM_MODEL_ROUTING.description: Route to the cheapest model that can achieve the required quality for the use case
CHEAP_TO_PREMIUM_MODEL_ROUTING.routing_rule: Always start at tier appropriate to output use. Never use tier_4 for digital social. Never use tier_1 for final outputs.
CHEAP_TO_PREMIUM_MODEL_ROUTING.smart_escalation: If tier_2 QC score < 7.5, automatically escalate to tier_3 for that asset

non_negotiables: face OR bold text OR both
youtube_thumbnail_playbook.composition: THUMBNAIL_HALVES — subject one side, text other
youtube_thumbnail_playbook.color_strategy: high contrast against YouTube white UI — dark or bright BG
youtube_thumbnail_playbook.text_treatment: ROUTE_B always — generate clean scene, overlay large bold text
youtube_thumbnail_playbook.model_rec: flux_2_dev for scene, text overlay in post
youtube_thumbnail_playbook.glow: none or soft product if product thumbnail

instagram_feed_ad_playbook.text_treatment: ROUTE_B — clean zone lower third, text overlay with semi-transparent treatment
instagram_feed_ad_playbook.final_check: works without audio, works without caption

business_card_playbook.model_rec: ROUTE_B: flux_2_dev background + text overlay / ROUTE_D: photo + recraft pattern

styles.minimal: white card, name large, everything else small, single color accent
styles.premium: dark card, gold foil effect, embossed feel, minimal text
styles.creative: full bleed visual, name floats over, unconventional layout
styles.tech: grid background, monospace accents, code aesthetic

non_negotiables: emotion = joy or warmth or celebration
festival_poster_playbook.composition: MAXIMALIST_DENSITY for traditional / HERO_DOMINANT for modern
festival_poster_playbook.text_treatment: ROUTE_A for simple greeting (ideogram) / ROUTE_B for complex poster
festival_poster_playbook.model_rec: ideogram_turbo for text-heavy / flux_2_pro for scene-heavy / recraft for decorative elements
festival_poster_playbook.glow: warm_diya for Diwali / diffuse_warm for Holi / golden for Eid
festival_poster_playbook.cultural_check: MANDATORY before shipping — verify all symbols, colors, copy are culturally correct

billboard_playbook.text_treatment: ROUTE_A if 2-3 words (ideogram) / ROUTE_B if brand name + tagline
billboard_playbook.model_rec: flux_2_max for hero image / ideogram for typographic-led
billboard_playbook.final_check: show to someone for 2 seconds. what did they remember?

non_negotiables: works on white AND dark background
logo_playbook.prompt_rule: Shape-first. Color count explicit. Clean edges. No gradients unless intentional.
